title: Analyze a supported review URL end to end
description: A free visitor can submit a supported review URL from the home page, watch the analysis progress, and reach a usable report.

steps.description: Fill a supported product review URL into the analysis input
Verify the analysis loading phases are displayed
Verify a completed analysis report is displayed

title: Complete a free analysis from the home page
description: This verifies that a free visitor can submit a supported review URL, wait for the analysis process, and reach a usable report.

steps.description: Paste a supported product review URL into the analysis input
Verify the analysis report is displayed
Verify the report includes analysis results

title: Run a supported review analysis from the homepage
description: A free visitor can submit a supported review URL from the home page and reach a usable analysis report with the expected loading journey.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the review URL field
Verify the analysis loading phases are shown
Verify a usable analysis report is displayed

title: Reach the paywall after using the free quota
description: This verifies that a free visitor is prompted to upgrade after completing the third analysis.

steps.description: Paste a supported product review URL into the analysis input
Paste another supported product review URL into the analysis input
Paste a third supported product review URL into the analysis input
Verify an upgrade prompt is displayed
Verify the paywall modal is displayed

title: See the free usage paywall after exhausting analyses
description: A free user who has reached the analysis limit is shown the upgrade prompt instead of starting another analysis.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the review URL field
Fill a different supported review URL into the review URL field
Fill another different supported review URL into the review URL field
Fill a fourth supported review URL into the review URL field
Verify an upgrade prompt is shown

title: Enforce the free analysis quota with upgrade prompt
description: A free visitor who completes the allowed number of analyses is shown the paywall modal and upgrade options on the next attempt.

steps.description: Complete the analysis flow with a supported product review URL
Repeat the analysis flow with a second supported product review URL
Repeat the analysis flow with a third supported product review URL
Attempt another analysis with a supported product review URL
Verify a paywall modal is displayed

title: Open the dashboard after sign-in
description: An authenticated user can access the dashboard and see their saved reports.

steps.description: Fill in the login email with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: See the loading journey during analysis
description: A free visitor sees the expected review analysis progress states before the report is shown.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the review URL field
Verify the platform detection phase is shown
Verify the review fetching phase is shown
Verify the AI analysis phase is shown

title: See the free usage counter after running an analysis
description: This verifies that a free visitor can view their remaining analysis usage after completing a report.

steps.description: Paste a supported product review URL into the analysis input
Verify the free usage counter is displayed
Verify the counter reflects one completed analysis

title: Request an upgrade from the paywall modal
description: A free user can open the upgrade flow from the paywall prompt after exhausting free analyses.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the review URL field
Fill a different supported review URL into the review URL field
Fill another different supported review URL into the review URL field
Fill a fourth supported review URL into the review URL field
Choose the upgrade option from the paywall
Verify the checkout flow is opened

title: Analyze from an example URL shortcut
description: A visitor can use an example URL on the home page to auto-fill the analysis input and reach a completed report.

steps.description: Verify the analysis loading phases are displayed
Verify a completed analysis report is displayed

title: Compare two products side by side
description: An authenticated user can submit two product URLs on the compare page and review the resulting comparison and winner.

steps.description: Fill in the login email with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill a first supported product review URL into the first comparison field
Fill a second supported product review URL into the second comparison field
Verify the executive summary is displayed

title: Compare two products and review the winner
description: A paid user can submit two product URLs on the comparison page and see the executive summary, winner, and breakdown results.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the first product field
Fill a different supported review URL into the second product field
Verify the executive summary and overall winner are displayed
Verify the strengths, weaknesses, and feature-by-feature results are displayed

title: View report insights on the analysis page
description: A user viewing a completed analysis can see the key report sections needed to interpret review sentiment and themes.

steps.description: Verify sentiment breakdown content is displayed
Verify star distribution content is displayed
Verify pain points content is displayed
Verify improvement ideas content is displayed
Verify competitor signal content is displayed

title: Review the key sections of an analysis report
description: A generated analysis report shows the core insights users need to evaluate a product review summary.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the review URL field
Verify the sentiment breakdown is displayed
Verify the pain points, praises, and improvement ideas are displayed

title: See loading phases during analysis
description: A visitor submitting a supported review URL sees the expected analysis progress states before the report appears.

steps.description: Fill a supported product review URL into the analysis input
Verify the detecting platform phase is displayed
Verify the fetching reviews phase is displayed
Verify the running AI analysis phase is displayed

title: Access the dashboard after signing in
description: A signed-in user can reach the dashboard and see saved reports instead of an upgrade prompt when they have a paid plan.

title: Open the upgrade flow from the paywall
description: This verifies that a free visitor can use the paywall to reach the upgrade checkout flow.

steps.description: Paste a supported product review URL into the analysis input
Repeat analysis submissions until the free quota is exhausted
Open the paywall modal upgrade action
Verify the checkout flow is displayed
Verify the user is presented with an upgrade purchase option

title: Open a saved report from the dashboard
description: A paid user can open a saved report card from the dashboard and view the stored analysis page.

steps.description: Verify the saved analysis page is displayed

title: Copy a report link from the analysis page
description: A user can copy a generated report link from the analysis page for sharing or later access.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the review URL field
Verify a copied-link confirmation is visible

title: Reach the report from the analysis page
description: A completed analysis opens the report view on the analysis page with the generated results available to review.

steps.description: Fill a supported product review URL into the analysis input
Verify the user reaches the analysis report page
Verify the report summary content is displayed

title: Analyze a supported example URL from the home page
description: This verifies that a visitor can use an example product URL from the home page to start analysis successfully.

steps.description: Select a supported example review URL from the home page
Verify the analysis report is displayed

title: See the dashboard upgrade prompt as a free user
description: A free signed-in user sees an upgrade prompt on the dashboard instead of saved reports.

steps.description: Verify an upgrade prompt is displayed

title: Export a report as a Pro user
description: A paid user can export the analysis report to PDF from the report page.

steps.description: Verify a downloadable PDF export is available

title: Start a new comparison after finishing one
description: A paid user can complete one comparison and then run another with the form ready for new inputs.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the first product field
Fill a different supported review URL into the second product field
Verify the comparison form is reset for a new run

title: Open the PDF export option for a paid report
description: A paid user can access the PDF export control from an analysis report.

steps.description: Fill a supported review URL into the review URL field
Verify the PDF export option is available

title: Copy the report link for sharing
description: A user can copy the analysis report link from the report page and see confirmation that it is ready to share.

steps.description: Verify a share-ready confirmation is displayed

title: View the homepage pricing upgrade entry point
description: A visitor can open the pricing section on the homepage and access an upgrade path from the plan cards.

steps.description: Choose a Pro or Agency plan
Verify the checkout flow is opened

title: Block unsupported review platforms
description: A visitor entering an unsupported or coming-soon review URL sees validation feedback instead of starting analysis.

steps.description: Fill an unsupported review platform URL into the analysis input
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify no analysis report is displayed

title: Request a magic link from the login page
description: A visitor can request magic-link sign-in from the login page and receive a confirmation to check their email.

steps.description: Fill an email address into the sign-in field
Verify a confirmation message is displayed

title: Request a magic-link sign-in
description: A visitor can request a sign-in link from the login page and receive a confirmation that the request was sent.

steps.description: Verify a sign-in request confirmation is visible

title: Prompt free users to upgrade for export
description: A free user viewing a report sees the upgrade prompt when trying to access restricted export functionality.

steps.description: Attempt to export the report to PDF
Verify an upgrade prompt is displayed

title: See validation for an unsupported review platform
description: A visitor is prevented from starting analysis with an unsupported review URL and sees a validation message.

steps.description: Fill an unsupported review URL into the review URL field
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Reject an unsupported review URL
description: This verifies that a visitor sees validation feedback when submitting a review URL from an unsupported platform.

steps.description: Paste an unsupported review URL into the analysis input
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify no analysis report is shown

title: See the coming-soon platform message for Google or Yelp
description: A visitor using a coming-soon review platform is shown that the platform is not yet supported.

steps.description: Fill a Google or Yelp review URL into the review URL field
Verify a coming-soon message is visible

title: Return to the home page from login
description: A visitor can use the back navigation option on the login page to return to the home page.

steps.description: Verify the home page is displayed

title: Show coming-soon platform guidance
description: This verifies that a visitor gets clear guidance when choosing a coming-soon platform instead of a supported one.

steps.description: Verify a coming-soon message is displayed
Verify analysis cannot be started for that platform
